description: Style Note Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, this shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces. Product Details White shoe with central lace-ups, overlays, inlays and perforations Padded tongue and inner Foamy rubber midsole TPU outsole with patterned grooves Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
